user.title: HA PyScript Automations
user.description: Set up the integration. Click Submit to install the bundled blueprints, pyscript modules, and rendered docs into your config directory.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of HA PyScript Automations can be configured.

data_description.cli_symlink_dir: Optional directory where bundled CLI scripts will be symlinked. Leave empty to skip installing CLI scripts.
